sidebar.title: Smart Organizer
sidebar.dependency_check_hint: Run this only when you need to inspect optional runtime tools.
sidebar.upload_limits: Upload limits: per file {file_size}, per batch {batch_size}

hero.title: Smart File Organization Assistant
hero.subtitle: Preview first, quarantine before deleting, and safely spot stale or oversized files.

home.safety_notice: This tool never deletes files directly. Every organization action moves files into quarantine first, and you can restore them later.

process.step1_desc: Enter a folder path and start scanning to see which files may need attention.
process.step2_desc: Review the suggestions and reasons before deciding what to act on.
process.step3_desc: Files are moved to quarantine first instead of being deleted.
process.step4_desc: You can restore files later or export Markdown and CSV reports.

scan.title: Scan Folder
scan.description: This page reads file metadata only so you can review likely cleanup candidates safely.
scan.permission_denied: Permission denied while scanning this folder.
scan.empty: No scan results yet. Enter a folder path and click “Start Scan” first.

candidates.title: Candidate Files
candidates.empty: This folder currently has no stale or oversized files matching your scan settings.
candidates.limit_warning: Showing the first {shown} candidates out of {total} to keep the table responsive.
candidates.confirm_quarantine: I understand these files will move into `.smart_organizer_quarantine/` first and can be restored later.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.empty_largest: No large-file items to show yet.
dashboard.empty_stale: No stale-file items to show yet.

quarantine.title: Quarantine & Restore
quarantine.description: Quarantine is a safe holding area, not deletion. You can restore files whenever needed.
quarantine.empty: There are no quarantine items to restore for this folder.

upload.title: Upload Analysis
upload.description: Upload PDFs, images, or videos and the app will try to extract text, previews, and classification suggestions.
upload.limit_summary: Upload limits: per file {file_size}, per batch {batch_size}.
upload.batch_guidance: Batch guidance: analysis keeps uploads in memory, so smaller batches are easier to review. Current batch limit: {size}.
upload.empty: No files uploaded yet. Upload a PDF, image, or video to begin analysis.
upload.ready: Ready to analyze {count} file(s), total size {size}.
upload.large_batch_warning: This batch may take a while because several large files are queued together.
upload.no_results: No files were analyzed this time. Check the errors above for details.
upload.limit_file: {name}: file size {size} exceeds the per-file limit of {max_size}.
upload.limit_batch: Batch size {size} exceeds the upload batch limit of {max_size}. Upload fewer or smaller files at once.

review.title: Review Results
review.description: Check the classification, summary, and preview before sending files into the organization flow.
review.empty: No analysis results yet. Start from “Upload Analysis” first.
review.invalid_format: Analysis results have an unexpected format.
review.video_thumbnail_unavailable: No video thumbnail is currently available.
review.degraded_warning: Some analysis steps were degraded or fell back safely.
review.scanned_warning: This document may be scanned; OCR or fallback extraction was used.
review.enable_ai_first: Enable AI summary in the sidebar first.
review.confirm_success: Reviewed files are ready for “Execute Organization”.

execute.title: Execute Organization
execute.description: Move confirmed files into the organized destination by category.
execute.empty: No confirmed items yet. Review the analysis results first.
execute.partial_success: Organized {success_count} item(s). Kept {failed_count} failed item(s) in the pending list for retry.

search_records.title: Search & Records
search_records.description: Look up previous analysis, classification, and organization results.
search_records.search_empty: No search yet. Enter a keyword to look through previous analysis records.
search_records.search_no_results: No matching organization records were found.
search_records.download_unavailable: This file cannot be downloaded safely right now.
search_records.search_index_failed: Search index failed. Try rebuilding records in “Organization Records”.
search_records.no_final_path: Record has no organized file path.
search_records.invalid_path: Record contains an invalid file path.
search_records.path_outside_repo: Record path is outside the repository and cannot be downloaded.
search_records.file_missing: The organized file is no longer available on disk.
search_records.records_empty: No matching organization records were found.
search_records.records_reset_hint: Clear the search or reset the filters to bring records back into view.
search_records.maintenance_hint: Use reclassify when a record needs a fresh metadata-based topic assignment.
search_records.reclassify_missing_file: The file is no longer available on disk. Refresh locations first.
search_records.reclassify_unavailable: Reclassify becomes available after records are loaded. Refresh and rebuild remain available.
